name: Push Press
setup: Bar on front delts, core braced
execution: Slight dip (quarter squat) — ~15-20 degrees knee bend
Drive up explosively from the dip
Press bar overhead using leg drive momentum
common_mistakes: Too deep of a dip (turn into squat + press)
Not transferring leg drive through the bar
cues: Dip low enough that it helps, not so low it hurts
Bar path goes slightly back, then up
